title: SAMSUNG Galaxy S26 Ultra - 512 GB, Cobalt Violet
subtitle: SAMSUNG Galaxy S26 Ultra
overview: The Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra is built for big ideas and even bigger performance. Galaxy AI makes everyday tasks easier and your creative ideas even better. Just tell it what you need and watch it go to work. Photo Assist helps you edit pictures by adding, removing or adjusting objects with just a tap. That means fewer retakes and pro-looking shots. Now Nudge learns your habits and gives helpful suggestions right when you need them. From recommending apps to auto filling in forms, it's got your back. And its seriously impressive 200 MP quad camera system and Nightography AI make sure every snap is a masterpiece. From low-light concerts to city lights and night-time adventures, your photos will be full of life and colour.Good to know- Privacy Display keeps your content visible only to you by limiting side-angle views- The QHD+ Dynamic AMOLED display makes everything look sharp and bold- Qualcomm SM8850 processor and 12 GB RAM keep everything lightning fast- The 5000 mAh battery lets you
key_features: Quad 200 MP / 50 MP / 50 MP / 10 MP main cameras

title: PLAYSTATION PS5 DualSense Wireless Controller with USB Type-C Cable - Midnight Black
subtitle: PLAYSTATION PS5 DualSense Wireless
overview: Bring your PC games to life with the PS5 DualSense wireless controller. The Haptic feedback lets you feel every hit, knock and tiny detail like it's happening right in your hands. Adaptive triggers add that extra bit of tension, changing with whatever's going on in the game. And with quick Bluetooth pairing or USB Type-C, you can hop between your PC, console or phone without breaking your flow.  Good to know  - Steam support gets you into 10,000+ PC games straight away - Its multi-device memory keeps four Bluetooth connections ready to switch - Remote Play streams your PS5 or PS4 games straight to your PC - Its textured controls improve grip and precision during fast in-game moments - The rechargeable battery gives you hours of wireless gameplay - Firmware updates install directly through the PlayStation Accessories PC app
key_features: Adaptive triggers with varying levels of force & tension
Create button lets you capture & broadcast easily

title: HP Smart Tank 7006 All-in-One Wireless Inkjet Printer
subtitle: HP Smart Tank 7006
overview: Say goodbye to cartridges and save money on ink with this HP Smart Tank Inkjet Printer. The included ink bottles can print up to 12,000 black and white and 8,000 pages of colour. Refilling the ink is easy thanks to the spill-free resealable bottles - so no inky fingers.   Good to know  - Automatic double-sided printing means less paper used and more money, time and trees saved - Automatic ink sensor constantly monitors levels, letting you know in advance when ink is low so there are no nasty surprises - Print, scan and copy straight from your phone with the HP Smart App - The WiFi connection and Apple AirPrint let you print from anywhere
key_features: HP Smart Tank – includes up to 3 years of ink

title: FITBIT Charge 6 Fitness Tracker - Coral, Silicone Strap, Universal
subtitle: FITBIT Charge 6 Fitness
overview: Get your fitness journey back on track with the Fitbit Charge 6. It has a whopping 7 days of battery life so you can track an entire weeks' worth of data without running out of juice. Even when you're asleep, your Fitbit is monitoring your heart rate, blood oxygen, skin temperature and more, for a well-rounded overview of your health. With a daily sleep score, you'll be able to tell how soundly your slept which means you can improve your health from all angles.  Good to know  - See how you're dealing with day to day stressors with the daily personalised stress management score - Check your heart rate when working out to see if you're in fat burn, cardio or peak zones - You'll be notified of any irregular heart rhythms that can be signs of atrial fibrillation - Track steps, distance and calories, and see how long you're staying in the active zone - Choose from 40 exercise modes, and SmartTrack starts tracking automatically - The water resistance means you can swim, sweat or get caught i

title: HP OmniBook 7 Aero 13.3" Laptop - AMD Ryzen AI 7, 1 TB SSD, Silver
subtitle: HP OmniBook 7 Aero
overview: Get some serious work done with this HP OmniBook 7 Aero. Powered by the AMD Ryzen AI 7 processor, it's super-fast and accelerated by AI to be even smarter. Perfect for speeding though work or school assignments. The Full HD+ screen's got amazing colours and contrast that'll make movies and shows pop off the screen. And the OmniBook's not just ultra-powerful, but efficient, too. A single charge gives you up to 12 hours of battery life, so you can leave the charger at home.  Good to know  - Even with all that power it weighs less than 1 kg, so you can bring it anywhere you go- The anti-glare IPS display reduces eye strain during long work sessions - Look your best on calls - the 5 MP webcam uses AI Noise Reduction for a clear picture - Windows Hello facial recognition is faster and safer than typing in a password - Load up websites and videos in no time thanks to WiFi 6 - 16 GB of DDR RAM lets you run multiple apps at the same time, including loads of browser tabs - The 1 TB SSD lets you

title: JLAB Go Party Portable Bluetooth Speaker - Black
subtitle: JLAB Go Party Portable
overview: Turn up the fun with this JLab Go Party speaker. This compact 10 W speaker's dual drivers and passive woofers give you clear highs and punchy bass. With the JLab app, you can choose from Signature, Balance or Bass Boost EQ presets and set the RGB party lights to match your mood. The batterylasts up to 16 hours (or around 8 with lights), so the music keeps going well into the night. And when you want to go big, LabSync lets you link up to 100 speakers, so every room joins in on the party.  Good to know  - Stereo pairing lets you split sound left and right for an immersive feel - IP56 water resistance means a bit of rain won't stop the music - The loop handle makes the speaker easy to carry wherever you go

title: JLAB JBuds Party Portable Bluetooth Speaker - Black
subtitle: JLAB JBuds Party Portable
overview: This JLab JBuds Party Speaker is great when you want bigger, clearer sound without carrying something heavy. Its dual 2.5" drivers and 2" passive woofers deliver chest-thumping audio with 30 watts of power, so your music fills the space whether you're indoors or outside. With the JLab app, you can control and customise the sound, or quickly pick from the EQ presets like JLab Signature, Balance and Bass Boost. And if you want to lift the mood a bit, the RGB lighting brings a fun glow.  Good to know  - Stereo Pairing creates an immersive left-right setup - 12+ hours playtime will see you well into the night - LabSync syncs up to 100 JLab Party speakers - The IP56 splash proof design can handle light rain and splashes - The loop strap makes it easier to carry around

specs.value: 2” passive woofers x 2, 2.5” full-frequency drivers x 1
Volume Knob for accurate control, Four quick access buttons, Customizable EQ settings, Integrated handle
